name: tailer-session-id-pinning
description: Tailers persist Claude session_id from stream-json system/result events into SessionStore.claudeSessionId. Single-fire flag (sessionIdPinned) per tailer lifetime mirrors claude.ts onSessionId pattern. Resume mismatch detection: prior != observed → observed wins, log warning to stderr (production) or call _onResumeMismatch DI hook (tests). Tailer owns its own SessionStore lifecycle when sessionsDbPath provided.
